title: VintageDisplay
description: Replaces normal durability bars through percentages
body:
VintageDisplay is a port of GTNH's Mod DuraDisplay for 1.7.10 to 1.12 allowing to replace durability bars with percentages but also more!

Currently it shows percentage for:
- Durability
- Energy (Only if compat was added for the Energy System, currently has support for RF, IC2 EU, GT EU and AE2 AE)
- Botania & Blood Magic Flasks
You can also switch percentage to something else per Overlay, for example showing used, remaining (as normal number), ...

If there's any Mod/Item that have no compat currently, create an Issue on the Issue tracker and it should be added in the next update.
